scripts.test:e2e: env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/ops/check-port-free.mjs 4173 && env -u NO_COLOR E2E_BYPASS_ADMIN_AUTH=1 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:auth: env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/ops/check-port-free.mjs 4173 && env -u NO_COLOR E2E_BYPASS_ADMIN_AUTH=0 E2E_FAKE_AUTH=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_FAKE_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND="npm run dev:e2e:webpack" playwright test tests/e2e/admin-auth-real.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:turbopack: env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/ops/check-port-free.mjs 4173 && env -u NO_COLOR E2E_BYPASS_ADMIN_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND="npm run dev:e2e" playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:webpack: env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/ops/check-port-free.mjs 4173 && env -u NO_COLOR E2E_BYPASS_ADMIN_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND="npm run dev:e2e:webpack" playwright test
scripts.test:launch-readiness: npm run test:unit -- tests/unit/app/r/[code]/route.test.ts tests/unit/app/api/health/redirects/route.test.ts && npm run test:e2e:webpack -- --grep "admin manages short links and sees QR section on memorial edit|qr selector excludes inactive short links"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:auth
scripts.test:a11y: env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/ops/check-port-free.mjs 4173 && env -u NO_COLOR E2E_BYPASS_ADMIN_AUTH=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND="npm run dev:e2e:webpack" playwright test --grep @a11y
